ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for financial data */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "cc_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card */,
  "cc_number" TEXT /* Credit card number */,
  "ccv2" INTEGER /* Credit card verification value */,
  "cc_expires" TEXT /* Credit card expiration date */,
  "national_id" TEXT /* National identification number */,
  "mrn" TEXT /* Medical record number */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_account_number" TEXT /* Bank account number */,
  "bank_routing_number" TEXT /* Bank routing number */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of bank account */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the bank account */,
  "is_primary_account" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary account */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the credit card */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the credit card */,
  "billing_city" TEXT /* City for the billing address */,
  "billing_state" TEXT /* State for the billing address */,
  "billing_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for the billing address */,
  "billing_country" TEXT /* Country for the billing address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for health records */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight in pounds */,
  "height" REAL /* Height in centimeters */,
  "eye_color" TEXT /* Eye color */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies */,
  "emergency_contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary emergency contact */,
  "last_physical_exam" TEXT /* Date of the last physical exam */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure */,
  "cholesterol_level" REAL /* Cholesterol level */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee is a smoker */,
  "alcohol_consumer" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee consumes alcohol */,
  "vaccination_records" TEXT /* Vaccination records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_information" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for vehicle information */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" TEXT /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "vehicle_fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_registration_date" TEXT /* Date of vehicle registration */,
  "vehicle_registration_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of vehicle registration */,
  "vehicle_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last vehicle inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for employment history */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the employee */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company of employment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title during the employment */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the previous job */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating during the employment */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor during the employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "role_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was terminated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location of the session */,
  "session_device" TEXT /* Device used for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., theme, timezone) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "preference_department" TEXT /* Department associated with the preference */,
  "preference_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was set */,
  "preference_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the employee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  "contact_city" TEXT /* City of the contact */,
  "contact_state" TEXT /* State of the contact */,
  "contact_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the contact */,
  "contact_country" TEXT /* Country of the contact */,
  "contact_relationship_description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "review_score" INTEGER /* Score given in the review */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided in the review */,
  "review_department" TEXT /* Department in which the review was conducted */,
  "review_location" TEXT /* Location where the review was conducted */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_position" TEXT /* Position of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_department" TEXT /* Department of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)
